name: chronoconquest
description: ChronoConquest - Historical World Map Strategy Game

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=backend && npm run build --workspace=frontend
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --workspace=frontend && npm install --workspace=backend
scripts.docker:prod:build: test -f .env.production || cp .env.production.example .env.production; docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.prod.yml --env-file .env.production build
scripts.docker:prod:up: test -f .env.production || cp .env.production.example .env.production; docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.prod.yml --env-file .env.production up -d
